subject: chore(infra): link Supabase project and push migrations
body:
Linked remote Supabase project, pushed all 4 migrations (schema, RLS,
geospatial function, updated_at trigger), and seeded with dev data.
Fixed config.toml health_timeout incompatibility with CLI v2.65.5.

Tags: supabase, database, deployment, config
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: deliverable-1
Semver: patch
